description_long: This sculpture depicts two human figures in an intimate embrace, kneeling on a roughly hewn rectangular base. The figures are rendered in a realistic style, with detailed musculature and expressive postures. One figure, likely male, sits with legs apart while the other, likely female, kneels and wraps her arms around his neck, their faces close together in a tender gesture. The surface of the sculpture is textured, with visible tool marks and a matte, stone-like finish. The base is irregular and appears to be carved from the same material as the figures, giving the piece a monolithic appearance. The overall coloration is a dark, weathered gray, suggesting the use of stone or bronze with a patina.
description: A realistic sculpture of two human figures embracing on a rough rectangular base, with detailed anatomy and a dark, stone-like finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the faces and upper bodies of the embracing figures, highlighting their emotional connection and the detailed hands and arms.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the kneeling posture of the female figure and the close proximity of their faces, with the male figure's legs visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the female figure and the overall mass of the sculpture, with less detail on facial features.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the intertwined arms and the dynamic composition of the figures, as well as the textured base.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a neutral background.
